function.name: searchConversations
function.description: Search and list conversations. Filter by status, date range, inbox, or tags, and search content with contentTerms/subjectTerms, email/emailDomain, customerIds, assignedTo, folderId, or conversationNumber. Searches all statuses by default.

query.description: Raw HelpScout query syntax (power users). The convenience filters below are compiled into this automatically. Example: (body:"keyword")

contentTerms.description: Match these terms in the message body (compiled to body:"term")

subjectTerms.description: Match these terms in the subject (compiled to subject:"term")

email.description: Match conversations involving this email (to/cc/bcc or customer)

emailDomain.description: Match conversations involving any email at this domain

customerIds.description: Conversations belonging to these customer IDs (the customer->conversations bridge)

tag.description: Filter by tag name (comma-separated for multiple)

assignedTo.description: Filter by assignee user ID (-1 for unassigned)

status.description: Filter by status. Omit to search active+pending+closed (excludes spam).

createdAfter.description: Filter conversations created after this timestamp (ISO8601)

createdBefore.description: Filter conversations created before this timestamp (ISO8601)

modifiedSince.description: Filter conversations modified after this timestamp (ISO8601)

fields.description: Specific fields to return (for partial responses)

function.name: getConversation
function.description: Get the raw Help Scout conversation object by ID. Optionally embeds threads for direct API parity; use getThreads when full thread pagination is needed. Set includeSystemActors to distinguish user, team, and system_user person types.

embed.description: Optional sub-entity to embed. Help Scout currently supports "threads".

includeSystemActors.description: When true, routes to the v3 conversation endpoint, which preserves the user, team, and system_user person types (v2 collapses system_user into user).

function.name: getConversationSummary
function.description: Get conversation summary with first customer message and latest staff reply

conversationId.description: The conversation ID to get summary for

function.name: getThreads
function.description: Retrieve full message history for a conversation. Returns all thread messages. Set includeSystemActors to distinguish user, team, and system_user person types.

conversationId.description: The conversation ID to get threads for

includeSystemActors.description: When true, routes to the v3 threads endpoint, which preserves the user, team, and system_user person types (v2 collapses system_user into user).

function.name: getServerTime
function.description: Get the current MCP host timestamp. Use before date-relative searches to calculate time ranges.

function.name: listAllInboxes
function.description: List all inboxes with IDs. Pass nameContains to filter by a case-insensitive name substring. Deprecated: inbox IDs now in server instructions. Only needed mid-session.

nameContains.description: Case-insensitive substring filter applied to inbox names after all pages are fetched. Omit to list every inbox.

function.name: getInbox
function.description: Get one Help Scout inbox by ID, including inbox email and resource links. Pass include to fan out and attach sub-resources in one call: "fields" (customFields with dropdown option IDs), "folders" (folder IDs and counts), and "routing" (rotation users and eligibility state). Each sub-resource is fetched from its own endpoint; a failure of one is reported under includeErrors without failing the whole call.

inboxId.description: Inbox ID from listAllInboxes or server instructions

include.description: Sub-resources to fetch and attach: "fields" -> customFields, "folders" -> folders, "routing" -> routing. Omit for just the inbox.

function.name: getCustomer
function.description: Get a customer profile by ID. Returns profile with contact details (emails, phones, chat handles, social profiles, websites) plus address from a separate lookup.

function.name: listCustomers
function.description: List or search customers by name, query syntax, or dates. Defaults to v2 page-based pagination. Set useV3 (or pass a cursor) to use the v3 Customers API with cursor pagination, which also enables the email and createdSince filters.

mailbox.description: Filter by inbox ID (v2 page path only)

modifiedSince.description: ISO 8601 date - only customers modified after this date

page.description: Page number for the default v2 page-based pagination (API returns 50 results per page)

useV3.description: Route to the v3 Customers endpoint (cursor-based pagination). Implied when a cursor is supplied.

cursor.description: Cursor for v3 pagination (from nextCursor in a previous v3 response). Supplying this forces the v3 path.

email.description: Filter by email address. v3 path only (requires useV3 or cursor).

createdSince.description: ISO 8601 date - only customers created after this date. v3 path only (requires useV3 or cursor).

function.name: searchCustomersByEmail
function.description: Search customers by email address using the v3 API. Provides email as a dedicated filter parameter (vs query syntax in v2) and cursor-based pagination.

cursor.description: Cursor for pagination (from nextCursor in previous response)

function.name: getCustomerContacts
function.description: Get all contact details for a customer: emails, phones, chat handles, social profiles, websites, and address. Calls dedicated sub-resource endpoints for complete data. Use after getCustomer or listCustomers.

function.name: getOrganization
function.description: Get an organization by ID with optional customer/conversation counts.

function.name: listOrganizations
function.description: List all organizations with sorting options. Use for discovering organizations before drilling into members or conversations. Returns 50 per page.

function.name: getOrganizationMembers
function.description: Get all customers belonging to an organization. Use after getOrganization to see who is in the org. Returns 50 per page.

function.name: getOrganizationConversations
function.description: Get all conversations associated with an organization. Traverses org-to-conversations without needing individual customer lookups. Returns 50 per page.

function.name: listCustomerProperties
function.description: List customer property definitions. Use to interpret custom property values embedded on customer records.

function.name: listOrganizationProperties
function.description: List organization property definitions. Use to interpret custom company property values embedded on organizations.

function.name: getOrganizationProperty
function.description: Get one organization property definition by slug. Use after listOrganizationProperties when exact option labels are needed.

function.name: listTags
function.description: List Help Scout tags used across inboxes. Use to discover tag IDs and exact names before filtering conversations or reports.

name.description: Optional case-insensitive client-side tag name filter

function.name: getTag
function.description: Get a Help Scout tag by ID. Use after listTags when an exact tag record is needed.

function.name: listUsers
function.description: List Help Scout users with optional exact email or inbox filter. Use to discover assignee IDs, mentions, and roles. Set includeStatuses to attach all user availability statuses; set includeSystemActors to list v3 system users (AI agents, integrations) instead.

inboxId.description: Inbox ID to find users with access to that inbox

includeStatuses.description: When true, additionally calls /users/status once and attaches all user email/chat availability statuses under "statuses" (not fanned out per user).

includeSystemActors.description: When true, routes to the v3 /system-users endpoint, returning system actors (AI agents, integration users) instead of standard users. Emits apiVersion: "v3". Ignores includeStatuses.

function.name: getUser
function.description: Get a Help Scout user by ID, or pass "me" to get the authenticated resource owner. Set includeStatus to attach the user availability status; set includeSystemActors to fetch the v3 system-user record instead.

userId.description: User ID from listUsers, or "me" for the authenticated resource owner

includeStatus.description: When true, also fetches /users/{id}/status and attaches the email/chat availability status under "status". Ignored when includeSystemActors is true.

includeSystemActors.description: When true, routes to the v3 /system-users/{id} endpoint, returning the system actor record instead of a standard user. Emits apiVersion: "v3". Takes precedence over includeStatus.

function.name: listTeams
function.description: List Help Scout teams. Use to discover team IDs before team-member lookup or team-scoped reporting.

function.name: getTeamMembers
function.description: List members of a Help Scout team. Use after listTeams to discover user IDs in a team.

function.name: listSavedReplies
function.description: List saved replies for a Help Scout inbox. Use to discover saved reply IDs and inspect reusable response templates.

inboxId.description: Inbox ID from listAllInboxes or server instructions

includeChatReplies.description: Include chat-only saved replies in the response

function.name: getSavedReply
function.description: Get one saved reply from a Help Scout inbox by ID.

inboxId.description: Inbox ID from listAllInboxes or server instructions

function.name: getOriginalSource
function.description: Get the original source for a Help Scout conversation thread. Set format to "rfc822" for raw email source, or "json" (default) for parsed source.

conversationId.description: Conversation ID from searchConversations or getConversationSummary

function.name: getAttachment
function.description: Get base64-encoded Help Scout attachment data by conversation and attachment ID.

conversationId.description: Conversation ID from searchConversations or getConversationSummary

attachmentId.description: Attachment ID from getThreads attachment links

function.name: downloadAttachmentFile
function.description: Download a Help Scout attachment file as base64 with response metadata.

conversationId.description: Conversation ID from searchConversations or getConversationSummary

attachmentId.description: Attachment ID from getThreads attachment links

function.name: listWorkflows
function.description: List Help Scout workflows. Use to inspect account workflow configuration and discover workflow IDs.

function.name: listWebhooks
function.description: List Help Scout webhooks. Use to inspect webhook configuration and discover webhook IDs.

function.name: getWebhook
function.description: Get a Help Scout webhook by ID.

function.name: getSatisfactionRating
function.description: Get a Help Scout satisfaction rating by ID.

function.name: getCompanyReport
function.description: Get a Help Scout company report for a bounded time range. report=overall (/reports/company), customers-helped (/reports/company/customers-helped), or drilldown (/reports/company/drilldown).

start.description: Start of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

end.description: End of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

previousStart.description: Optional comparison interval start, ISO 8601 (overall, customers-helped)

previousEnd.description: Optional comparison interval end, ISO 8601 (overall, customers-helped)

rows.description: Drilldown rows per page, max 50 (drilldown only)

function.name: getConversationsReport
function.description: Get a Help Scout conversations report for a bounded time range. report selects /reports/conversations[/<report>]: overall, volume-by-channel, busy-times, drilldown, fields-drilldown, new, new-drilldown, received-messages.

start.description: Start of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

end.description: End of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

previousStart.description: Optional comparison interval start, ISO 8601 (non-drilldown reports)

previousEnd.description: Optional comparison interval end, ISO 8601 (non-drilldown reports)

rows.description: Drilldown rows per page, max 50 (drilldown reports)

field.description: Field to drill into (required for fields-drilldown)

function.name: getProductivityReport
function.description: Get a Help Scout productivity report for a bounded time range. report selects /reports/productivity[/<report>]: overall, first-response-time, replies-sent, resolved, response-time, resolution-time.

start.description: Start of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

end.description: End of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

officeHours.description: Whether to take office hours into consideration

function.name: getUserReport
function.description: Get a Help Scout user or team report for a bounded time range. report selects /reports/user[/<report>]: overall, conversation-history, customers-helped, drilldown, happiness, ratings, replies, resolutions, chat.

user.description: User ID or team ID for the report

start.description: Start of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

end.description: End of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

officeHours.description: Whether to take office hours into consideration (overall, conversation-history, chat)

function.name: getHappinessReport
function.description: Get a Help Scout happiness report for a bounded time range. report=overall (/reports/happiness) or ratings (/reports/happiness/ratings).

start.description: Start of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

end.description: End of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

previousStart.description: Optional comparison interval start, ISO 8601 (overall only)

previousEnd.description: Optional comparison interval end, ISO 8601 (overall only)

function.name: getChannelReport
function.description: Get a Help Scout channel report for a bounded time range. channel selects /reports/chat, /reports/email, or /reports/phone.

start.description: Start of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

end.description: End of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

officeHours.description: Whether to take office hours into consideration

function.name: getDocsReport
function.description: Get the Help Scout Docs overall report for a bounded time range.

start.description: Start of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

end.description: End of the reporting interval, ISO 8601

sites.description: Docs site IDs to filter by

function.name: listDocsSites
function.description: List Help Scout Docs sites using the Docs API v1.

function.name: getDocsSite
function.description: Get one Help Scout Docs site by ID. Set includeRestrictions to also attach the restricted-site settings (secrets redacted).

includeRestrictions.description: When true, also fetches the restricted-site settings (/sites/{id}/restricted) and attaches them under "restrictions" with shared secrets redacted.

function.name: listDocsCollections
function.description: List Help Scout Docs collections, optionally scoped to a site.

function.name: getDocsCollection
function.description: Get one Help Scout Docs collection by ID or number.

function.name: listDocsCategories
function.description: List Help Scout Docs categories for a collection.

function.name: getDocsCategory
function.description: Get one Help Scout Docs category by ID or number.

function.name: listDocsArticles
function.description: List Help Scout Docs articles for a collection or category.

collectionId.description: Docs collection ID. Provide this or categoryId.

categoryId.description: Docs category ID. Provide this or collectionId.

function.name: searchDocsArticles
function.description: Search Help Scout Docs articles by query, site, collection, status, or visibility.

function.name: getDocsArticle
function.description: Get one Help Scout Docs article by ID or number.

draft.description: Return draft content when unpublished changes exist

function.name: listDocsRelatedArticles
function.description: List Help Scout Docs articles related to an article.

function.name: listDocsArticleRevisions
function.description: List Help Scout Docs article revisions.

function.name: getDocsArticleRevision
function.description: Get one Help Scout Docs article revision by ID.

function.name: listDocsRedirects
function.description: List Help Scout Docs redirects for a site.

function.name: getDocsRedirect
function.description: Get one Help Scout Docs redirect by ID.

function.name: findDocsRedirect
function.description: Resolve a Help Scout Docs redirect target from a site ID and URL path.

url.description: URL path to redirect from, e.g. /old/path
